title: Lreid
compiled_truth: Lreid is an external contact at [Sppc](companies/sppc). Over the corpus period (2000-11-07 to 2001-12-14), Lreid sent 3 and received 26 emails, totalling 29 interactions. Top correspondents: [Barry Tycholiz](people/barry-tycholiz) (2), [Steven P South](people/steven-p-south) (1).
